vulnerability.title: Uninstall iprutils Package
vulnerability.description: The iprutils package can be removed with the following command: $ sudo dnf remove iprutils
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # CAUTION: This remediation script will remove iprutils # from the system, and may remove any packages # that depend on iprutils. Execute this # remediation AFTER testing on a non-production # system! if rpm -q --quiet "iprutils" ; then dnf remove -y --noautoremove "iprutils" fi
